description_long: This is a pair of mid-top athletic shoes featuring a vibrant red-orange upper with light gray and white accent overlays. The shoes have a prominent black Adidas logo and three-stripe motif on the outer sides, with blue eyelets and laces providing a striking contrast. The collar and tongue are padded and finished in white and blue, respectively, suggesting comfort and support for the wearer. The soles are black and gray, designed for traction and durability, though the tread pattern is not visible. The shoes appear clean, unworn, and structurally intact, indicating a new condition. These shoes are suitable for urban environments, offering both style and functionality.
description: A pair of red-orange Adidas mid-top athletic shoes with black logos, blue laces, and gray accents, appearing new and unworn.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Adidas logo, three stripes, and the full lacing system with blue eyelets.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded blue collar and the back of the Adidas logo on both shoes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the Adidas logo and design details as seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, lacing system, and the symmetrical design of both shoes.
attribute_logo: Large black Adidas logo with three stripes on the outer side of each shoe.
